listings.title: Salesvue - Sales Engagement Platform
listings.description: Salesvue’s engagement platform empowers teams to grow revenue by working more efficiently using repeatable, scalable cadences.  All industries, including 5 of the top 10 Annuity Providers, utilize Salesvue to continuously improve process & performance.

listings.title: Marketo Sales Insight - Prioritise sales leads and close deals faster
listings.description: Marketo Sales Insight is a 100% native Force.com sales application that helps sales teams understand, prioritise, & interact with the hottest leads & opportunities to enable smart selling & close business faster. Be a Sales Genius with Sales Insight!

listings.title: Adobe Marketo Measure (fka Bizible)
listings.description: Adobe Marketo Measure (formerly known as Bizible) is the world's most popular and complete B2B marketing attribution solution. It automates measurement so marketers can make insight-driven decisions that maximize pipeline, revenue, and ROMI.

listings.title: Ventas AI SMS App for Salesforce | AI Dialer | WhatsApp | AI Chatbot & Voice
listings.description: Ventas SMS offers 25+ features for Salesforce, including Salesforce Dialer, bulk SMS, WhatsApp automation, and AI-powered messaging. Automate cross-channel conversations and engage customers with smart SMS, WhatsApp, & AI voice interactions in Salesforce.

listings.title: Blackthorn Events | Your events. Your data. All in Salesforce.
listings.description:
Blackthorn Events | Your events. Your data. All in Salesforce.

Blackthorn turns any organization’s Salesforce® CRM into event planning software powered by their connected data.

listings.title: Rethink | Commercial Real Estate Software
listings.description: Rethink is a native CRE CRM app built entirely on the Salesforce platform. Built for commercial brokers, agents, property managers, and investors, Rethink enables CRE professionals to manage their entire business in one, easy-to-use application.

listings.title: Survey Force by Salesforce Labs
listings.description: Survey Force (Lightning Ready) allows you to create, send, and capture customer feedback natively in salesforce.com.

listings.title: Unsubscribe Link
listings.description: Include an easy way for recipients to unsubscribe from commercial email sent through Salesforce. By clicking the link, all contacts and leads with the relevant email address will be checked "Email Opt Out."
